translations.en: an angry-looking man wearing short swords on either hip.
translations.zh: 一位面色憤怒、腰間各配一把短劍的男子。

translations.en: He was just about to punch someone when you approached him.*
translations.zh: 就在汝靠近他時，他正準備揮拳打人。*

translations.en: "This is no time for talk. There's fighting to do!"
translations.zh: 「現在不是說話的時候，有架要打！」

translations.en: "Good $T."
translations.zh: 「$T 吉祥。」

translations.en: "Ho there, $G!"
"Good $T, Stelnar." @Shamino and Stelnar shake hands. "$P, this is Stelnar Starhelm."
translations.zh: 「$T 吉祥，史塔赫姆。」@夏米諾與史塔赫姆握手。「$P，這位是史塔赫姆。」

translations.en: "Pleased to meet you, $G $P."
translations.zh: 「幸會，$G $P。」

translations.en: "I'm called Starhelm."
translations.zh: 「吾人稱史塔赫姆。」

translations.en: "Arvin? He seems a good sort."
translations.zh: 「阿文？他看起來是個好人。」

translations.en: "He's a bard. I do not really know him."
translations.zh: 「他是個吟遊詩人。吾並不太認識他。」

translations.en: "Oh, yes. Brave fellow."
translations.zh: 「哦，是的。勇敢的傢伙。」

translations.en: "Shamino and I travelled the Spiritwood together for a time."
translations.zh: 「夏米諾與吾曾一同在靈魂林遊歷了一段時日。」

translations.en: "I am a @monster-slayer."
translations.zh: 「吾乃@滅怪者。」

translations.en: "I hate all monsters. They are a blight on the face of Britannia!"
translations.zh: 「吾憎恨所有怪物。彼等乃不列顛尼亞大地之禍害！」

translations.en: "For the past year I've been killing @wisps and the like in Spiritwood."
translations.zh: 「過去一整年，吾在靈魂林中獵殺@幽影等生靈。」

translations.en: "Wisps are nasty flickers, very hard to kill. Not like @gargoyles, now."
translations.zh: 「幽影是惡毒的鬼火，極難殺滅。與@魔像族不同。」

translations.en: "There's one that they call @Sin 'Vraal."
translations.zh: 「其中有一位名為@辛弗拉的。」

translations.en: "If I had my way, that gargoyle would be a @statue."
translations.zh: 「若讓吾做主，那魔像早已成了一座@石像。」

translations.en: "They turn to stone when ye slay them."
translations.zh: 「殺死牠們後，牠們會化為石頭。」

translations.en: "That's drivel, friend Starhelm!" says Van Kellian.
translations.zh: 「胡說，朋友史塔赫姆！」范凱利安說道。

translations.en: "A gargoyle's a flesh and blood beast."
translations.zh: 「魔像族乃血肉之軀。」

translations.en: "Stone indeed!"
translations.zh: 「石頭！哼！」

translations.en: "Bards! A gargoyle is an @ugly monster, and that's that."
translations.zh: 「詩人！魔像不過是@醜陋的怪物，就這樣。」

translations.en: "Van murmurs "Ugliness is but skin deep, just as beauty is."
translations.zh: 「范低語道：「醜陋不過皮相而已，如同美貌一樣。」

translations.en: "Gargoyle skin is very thick and deep, as everyone knows."
translations.zh: 「眾所皆知，魔像族的皮膚又厚又深，」

translations.en: "Never trust anything ugly."
translations.zh: 「永遠別信任醜陋的東西。」

translations.en: "He's a vicious @daemon."
translations.zh: 「牠是個兇殘的@惡魔。」

translations.en: "Yes, Sin 'Vraal is an evil wretch."
translations.zh: 「是的，辛弗拉是個邪惡的惡棍。」

translations.en: "How could Lord @British imagine that a gargoyle could understand virtue?"
translations.zh: 「@不列顛王怎能想像魔像族能理解美德？」

translations.en: "Lord British defeated Sin 'Vraal in the underworld."
translations.zh: 「不列顛王曾在幽冥界擊敗辛弗拉。」

translations.en: "The gargoyle went to live in the @Dry Land."
translations.zh: 「那魔像去了@旱地居住。」

translations.en: "'Tis a @desert east of the Bloody Plains. There is a shrine there."
translations.zh: 「此乃血腥平原以東的一處@沙漠。那裡有一座聖壇。」

translations.en: "I've never been to that desert, or the Shrine of Honesty."
translations.zh: 「吾從未去過那片沙漠，也未曾到過誠實聖壇。」

translations.en: "Farewell, $P."
"Have a pleasant $T, $G."
translations.zh: 「願汝有個愉快的$T，$G。」

translations.en: "I cannot help ye with that."
translations.zh: 「此事吾無法助汝。」

translator_notes: 史塔赫姆是個偏激的怪物獵人，深信魔像族邪惡無救。與范凱利安的辯論（魔像皮膚是否為石頭）頗有趣味。Shamino 在此以@ keyword 形式出現。辛弗拉（Sin'Vraal）沿用 glossary 譯名。
